zh: 从概念到验证设计和优化功能原型。利用 CAD 驱动设计和精密激光切割创建具有各向异性机械特性的基体结构，用于针对性脊柱操控。
工程化并集成气动控制系统，包括线性执行器和压力调节器，编程控制逻辑以执行安全、受限和可重复的治疗动作。
通过结构化测试协议验证概念验证，证明其能够实现目标医疗应用所需的力和位移输出。
en: Designed and optimised a functional prototype from concept to validation. Utilising CAD-driven design and precision laser cutting to create a base structure with anisotropic mechanical properties for targeted spinal manipulation.

Engineered and integrated a pneumatic control system featuring linear actuators and pressure regulators, programming the control logic to execute safe, restricted, and reproducible therapeutic movements.
Validated the proof-of-concept through a structured testing protocol, demonstrating its capability to achieve specified force and displacement outputs required for the intended medical application.

zh: 制造由 3D 打印微纤维增强水凝胶基体组成的新型人工腱复合材料，使用校准的拉伸试验机系统评估关键机械性能（极限抗拉强度、杨氏模量）。
对破坏模式进行详细视频分析，识别复合材料的结构弱点和断裂扩展，为迭代设计提供关键见解。
采用外科缝合技术的新型试样安装系统消除夹具滑移和预测试损坏，测试可靠性提高 19 倍。
分析实验数据指导腱设计优化，研究纤维-凝胶比、纤维直径和结构轮廓对复合材料机械性能的影响。
en: Fabricated novel artificial tendon composites and systematically evaluated key mechanical properties (UTS, Young's Modulus) using a calibrated tensile testing machine.
Conducted detailed video analysis of failure modes to identify structural weaknesses and fracture propagation, providing critical insights for iterative design.
Novel specimen mounting system using surgical suture technique eliminated grip slippage, increasing testing reliability by a factor of 19.
Analysed experimental data to guide tendon design refinement, investigating effects of fibre-to-gel ratio, fibre diameter, and structural profile.

title.zh: 后置 3D 打印机线轴支架重新设计

zh: 识别并分析 OEM 侧面线轴支架造成的关键工作空间效率问题。
完成从概念到验证的完整设计周期：基准化解决方案、定义工程要求（非破坏性安装、3kg+ 负载、优化灯丝路径），使用 Fusion 360 建模迭代原型。
对关键部件进行静态力分析 (FEA)，预测应力集中并优化制造可靠性设计。
后置设计将工作台打印机容量从 4 台增至 5 台（+25%），不扩大物理占用。
100+ 小时连续打印验证，零机械故障。
en: Identified and analysed critical workspace inefficiency caused by OEM side-mounted spool holder consuming excessive lateral space.
Spearheaded full design cycle: benchmarked solutions, defined engineering requirements (non-destructive install, 3kg+ load, optimised filament path), modelled iterative prototypes in Fusion 360.
Static force analysis (FEA) on critical components to predict stress concentrations and optimise DFM reliability.
Rear-mount design increased workbench capacity by 25% (4 to 5 units) without expanding footprint.
Validated through 100+ hours of continuous printing with zero mechanical failures.
